fields.description: Full patient name
SA ID number (13 digits)
Date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD)
Male/Female
Patient residential address
Contact number
Relationship to main member (e.g. Self, Child, Spouse)
Medical aid/scheme name (e.g. GEMS, Discovery, Bonitas, Medshield)
Specific plan/option name (e.g. Classic Saver, Emerald Value)
Full name and surname of the principal/main member
SA ID number or date of birth of the principal member
Scheme membership number (full number)
Dependent code if the patient is not the main member (e.g. 01, 02)
Pre-authorization or reference number. If not applicable, write N/A.
fields.rules: Mandatory for IFT incidents and GEMS scheme primary calls. If patient paid cash or no auth was issued, value should be N/A.

fields.description: Name of EMS service provider company and contact details
BHF (Board of Healthcare Funders) practice/PCNS number — must be active
fields.rules: Must be present for scheme billing. Critical field.

fields.description: Primary treating paramedic/crew member 1 full name
HPCSA registration number of crew member 1
Full name and initials of crew member 1
Qualification of crew member 1 (e.g. AEA, CCA, Paramedic, ECP)
fields.rules: Must be one of: AEA, CCA, Paramedic, ECP, EMT-B. South African EMS qualifications only.

fields.description: HPCSA registration number of crew member 1
fields.rules: Critical for scheme reimbursement.

fields.description: Full name and initials of crew member 2 if present
Qualification of crew member 2 (e.g. AEA, CCA, Paramedic, ECP)
HPCSA registration number of crew member 2
Ambulance vehicle registration number
Vehicle/unit callsign
Date of service/incident (YYYY-MM-DD)
Type of incident: Primary (scene response) or IFT (Inter-Facility Transfer)
fields.rules: Must be one of: Primary, IFT

fields.description: Indicates if multiple patients were treated in this incident (e.g. Solo, Patient 1 of 2, Patient 2 of 2)
fields.rules: If multiple patients, triggers 150% billing rule review.

fields.description: Level of care rendered: ILS (Intermediate Life Support) or ALS (Advanced Life Support)
fields.rules: Must be one of: ILS, ALS. South African EMS does NOT use BLS. If the document says Basic or BLS, map to ILS.

fields.description: Level of care the crew was dispatched as (may differ from level rendered)
fields.rules: Must be one of: ILS, ALS.

fields.description: Physical scene address or GPS coordinates
Name of receiving hospital or facility (full name, no abbreviations)
Primary chief complaint or reason for the call
Mechanism of injury if trauma incident
Time call was received by dispatch (HH:MM 24-hour format)
Time crew was dispatched (HH:MM 24-hour format)
Time crew arrived on scene (HH:MM 24-hour format)
Time crew departed scene with patient (HH:MM 24-hour format)
Time transport to hospital started — same as departure from scene (HH:MM)
Time crew arrived at receiving hospital (HH:MM 24-hour format)
Time patient was handed over to receiving facility (HH:MM 24-hour format)
Vehicle odometer reading at time of dispatch (km)
fields.rules: Numeric value in kilometres.

fields.description: Vehicle odometer reading on arrival at scene (km)
fields.rules: Numeric value in kilometres. Must be >= odometer_dispatch.

fields.description: Vehicle odometer reading on departure from scene (km)
fields.rules: Numeric value in kilometres.

fields.description: Vehicle odometer reading on arrival at destination/hospital (km)
fields.rules: Numeric value in kilometres.

fields.description: Vehicle odometer reading on return to base (km). Required for long-distance or non-patient-carrying billing.
fields.rules: Numeric value in kilometres.

fields.description: AMPLE history: Allergies, Medications, Past medical history, Last meal, Events prior to incident
fields.rules: Structured narrative covering all 5 AMPLE components.

fields.description: Primary and secondary survey clinical findings and full narrative
JSON array of vital sign sets including time, BP, HR, RR, SpO2, GCS, Temperature
fields.rules: Must be a JSON array. Minimum 2 sets for primary calls, minimum 3 sets for IFT. Each object: {time, bp, hr, rr, spo2, gcs, temp, equipment}.

fields.description: JSON array of procedures and equipment used during the call
fields.rules: Must be a JSON array of strings or objects with {procedure, time, practitioner}.

fields.description: JSON array of medications and IV fluids administered
fields.rules: Must be a JSON array. Each object must have: {name, dose, route, time, practitioner}.

fields.description: Primary clinical diagnosis in plain language
ICD-10 diagnosis codes as a JSON array (e.g. ["I21.0", "S06"]). Extract from the billing/diagnosis section.
fields.rules: Must be a JSON array of strings. If no codes are found in the document, return [].

fields.description: Primary ICD-10 diagnosis code (single code, e.g. S72.0, I21.1)
fields.rules: Single ICD-10 string. If the diagnosis is injury/trauma (codes starting with S or T), an external cause code is also required.

fields.description: External cause ICD-10 code — mandatory when primary diagnosis is an injury or trauma
fields.rules: Must start with V, W, X, or Y and be exactly 5 characters (e.g. V892.0 style or W19.0). Only required when primary_icd10 starts with S or T.

fields.description: true/false — treating practitioner signature present on the physical PRF
true/false — patient or guardian signature present on the physical PRF
true/false — provider signature present
true/false — receiving facility clinician signature and qualification present
Qualification of the clinician who accepted handover at the receiving facility
Reason if any signature could not be obtained (e.g. patient unconscious, facility refused)
Invoice or claim number for this PRF
JSON array of tariff/CPT billing codes claimed (e.g. ["17600", "17601"])
fields.rules: Must be a JSON array of strings.

fields.description: Number of units claimed per tariff code
Total amount claimed in Rands (numeric, e.g. 4250.00)
fields.rules: Numeric value. Must match sum of all tariff line items.
